title: Dead Relay
briefing: Relay 13 transmitted for less than fifteen seconds before going dark. Recovered evidence contains a timestamp that cannot be correct and a message preserved inside network traffic. Determine what the relay retained.

objectives.prompt: What impossible year appears in the recovered relay log?
Complete the preserved packet message: THE PACKET ________
Decode fragment.txt. What does the relay retain?

evidence.label: relay_evidence.zip
evidence.description: Recovered relay logs and encoded fragment.

reward.message: CASE RESOLVED. Relay 13 retained what the observer forgot.
